name: Chocolate Chip Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the cake ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Grease a 9" x 13-inch baking pan.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
5. In another bowl, mix the topping ingredients: sugar, chopped nuts (optional), chocolate chips, and cinnamon.
6. Sprinkle the topping mixture over the cake batter.
7. Bake for about 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
